title: Sign-offs
newIntro: Send a document — release notes, an SOW, a validation protocol — to a set of signatories for a typed, email-verified electronic signature. Each signer gets a private link; the signed record is immutable and content-hashed.
listIntro: Documents sent for electronic sign-off, and their signature status.
empty: No sign-offs yet. Create one to send a document for signature.

readiness.heading: Before you can send this sign-off:

form.bodyPlaceholder: Paste the release notes markdown here…
form.bodyHint: Rendered as Markdown on the signer's page. Raw HTML is not rendered (security).
form.signersHint: Each signatory gets a private link and signs with a typed name + emailed one-time code.

sendNotReady: Add a title, a body, and at least one signatory first.

sign.linkInvalid: This link is invalid or is no longer active.
sign.linkProblemHint: Ask the sender to resend a fresh link.
sign.otpLocked: Too many attempts. Request a new code.
sign.otpExpired: That code expired. Request a new one.
sign.otpCooldown: A code was just sent — check your email, or wait a moment to resend.
sign.emailFailed: We couldn't email a code right now. Try again shortly.
sign.otpInvalid: That code isn't right. Try again.
sign.alreadyDecided: You've already recorded your decision on this document.
sign.gateBody: We'll email a one-time code to {email} to confirm your identity before you sign.
sign.submitError: We couldn't record your decision. Try again.
sign.declinedBanner: You declined to sign this document.
sign.signedBanner: Thank you — your signature has been recorded.
sign.attestation: By typing my name I am electronically signing as the {meaning} and attest that I have reviewed this document.
sign.legalNote: Your typed signature, the time, your role, and a hash of the exact document are recorded as the signed record.
